assumptions: The declared intragroup dividend has given rise to a recognised monetary receivable/payable before settlement.
The accounting issue is assessed in consolidated financial statements for foreign currency risk.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge accounting as a distinct hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and components of such items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge accounting as a distinct hedge accounting model for exposure to variability in cash flows, including certain highly probable forecast transactions.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation as a separate hedge accounting model relevant to foreign currency exposures in consolidation.
